source_metadata.title: 2026/01/28 - GA
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 28 January 2026 | Governance and Administration Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Public Service Commission; 2024/25 Annual review of Fire and Emergency New Zealand; 2024/25 Annual review of the Department of Prime Minister and Cabinet

Submitters

2024/25 Annual review of the Public Service Commission

Hon Judith Collins KC, Minister for the Public Service

Sir Brian Roche, Public Service Commissioner

2024/25 Annual review of Fire and Emergency New Zealand

Fire and Emergency New Zealand
- Rebecca Keoghan, Board Chair
- Kerry Gregory, Chief Executive
- Megan Stiffler, DCE Operational Response
- Darryl Purdy, DCE Corporate Services

2024/25 Annual review of the Department of Prime Minister and Cabinet

Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet
- Ben King, Secretary and Chief Executive
- Alan Cassidy, Deputy CE Corporate and Chief People Officer
- Janine Smith, Deputy CE Policy and Delivery Unit
